resources.string: Start by importing a receipt image. This screen now accepts images from the Photo Picker or document picker before camera and OCR slices arrive.
Photo Picker and files import are the first stable path into the app.
Once an image is imported, OCR and draft review will be connected on top of this capture flow.
No receipt selected yet. Import a receipt image to preview the first real app flow.
Imported receipt from the Android Photo Picker. The preview below confirms the capture entry path is working.
Imported receipt from the document picker. The preview below confirms file-based import is working.
Saved receipts, thumbnails, totals, and detail navigation will live here after local persistence is added.
This screen will show local receipt history with thumbnails, merchant names, dates, and totals.
The next product slice will add detail navigation, preview images, and delete actions.
Defaults for currency, image handling, and local storage behavior will be configured here once persistence exists.
Default currency and import behavior will become the first real settings values.
Later this area will explain local storage usage and image cleanup behavior.
